sales.description:
Ancients
C. Gargilius, Ogulnius, and M. Vergilius (ca. 86 BC). AR denarius (18mm, 7h). NGC Choice VF. Rome. Laureate head of Apollo right; thunderbolt below truncation / Jupiter driving quadriga galloping right, brandishing thunderbolt in right hand, reins in left. Crawford 350A/2. RRSC 2, D145.2. Nicely reflective details. Note, although NGC calls this issue anonymous, Crawford and Moretti list the above moneyers.
